title: 40-Minute Recording Budget (when enforced)
description: When the user selects the 40-minute limit, the generated TR doc must be teachable within 40 minutes per the calibrated time estimator (skeleton words × elaboration factor + per-slide overhead).
criterion: estimated_minutes <= 40 when enforce_time is on. (Aim ~36 for margin; far under ~25 may signal thin content — soft warning, not a fail.)

rubric.1: > 42 min when the limit is on.

cases.rationale: Within budget with margin (matches golden Session 15).
Over the 40-min ceiling with the limit on — must fail and trigger revision.
Limit OFF — time is reported but does not gate; passes by design.
